subject: [PORTAL] Bug fixes in Helm charts
commit_message:
[PORTAL] Bug fixes in Helm charts

Bug fixes in deployment.yaml file for both
portal-app and sdk components

Issue-ID: OOM-2582
Signed-off-by: SandeepLinux <Sandeep.Shah@att.com>
Change-Id: I4123ca8f48f503170466f7a965696406c14635d6
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 2 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/5951/

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

we have an issue with portal app:

Error: release onap-portal failed: Deployment.apps "onap-portal-app" is invalid: [spec.template.spec.initContainers[1].env[3].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.name: Invalid value: "": a DNS-1123 subdomain must consist of lower case alphanumeric characters, '-' or '.', and must start and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'example.com', regex used for validation is '[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?(\.[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*'), spec.template.spec.initContainers[1].env[4].valueFrom.secretKeyRef.name: Invalid value: "": a DNS-1123 subdomain must consist of lower case alphanumeric characters, '-' or '.', and must start and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'example.com', regex used for validation is '[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?(\.[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*')]
